title: Pedro Castro
text: Home * People * Pedro Castro Pedro Castro Elgarresta , [1] [2] a Spanish electrical engineer who graduated from University of the Basque Country in 1993 [3] . As computer chess programmer, Pedro Castro is author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol compatible open source chess engine DanaSah [4] , and the WinBoard compliant chess engine Caligula [5] . He further hosts the Hispanic Chess Engines site to promote the chess engines of Hispanic American authors, using the Winboard and UCI protocols [6] , also giving explanations of chess programming aspects, such as move generation , evaluation and search [7] .
